caption: A person wearing a distinctive tall, greyish-white sculpted hairstyle, glasses, and over-ear headphones speaks into a black microphone in a studio setting. They are dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with gold suspenders. In the background, a white wall features a framed picture of a yellow shield emblem, while a blurred area to the left shows a person with pink hair and a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". The on-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "#FESTALK PODCAST" and red text on the right that reads "B ESTALK 101". Across the sequence, the person is captured mid-speech, shifting their facial expression and gesturing with their right hand, which moves from their chest toward their chin and face as they talk.
